meta.title: NPEWS scoring — canonical machine-readable specification
meta.source: Configuration Document for SPOT NPEWS (NHS England)
meta.verified: Manually checked against the live NHS England NPEWS charts by Marcus Baw (GMC 4712729) on 2026-06-30.
meta.note: THIS FILE IS THE SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for NPEWS numeric scoring. Edit this file, then run `npm run generate:scoring` to regenerate pews-chart/npews-scoring-config.js (the runtime bands) and spec/npews-scoring-tables.generated.md (the human-readable unified table). Do not hand-edit the generated regions. The clinical narrative (respiratory-distress descriptors, review annotations) lives in spec/npews-scoring.md.
meta.conformance: Conformant with the national SPOT NPEWS algorithm: temperature and AVPU are NOT numerically scored — they are escalation / sepsis / specific-concern triggers (see nonScoring below).

sentinels.comment: Open-ended top bands use these as an inclusive max so the bands form a closed, machine-comparable set.

comment_ageBandBounds: Canonical age-in-years bounds per band, as half-open intervals [minAgeYears, maxAgeYears). The upper bound is EXCLUSIVE; null means open-ended. All boundaries fall on an exact birthday (1st, 5th, 13th), so band selection uses calendar completed-years (see pews-chart/age-band.js) rather than a 365.25-day approximation. This is the single source of truth for which chart applies at a given age.
comment_bands: Every band is [min, max, score]. Bands are inclusive of both ends; consecutive bands meet at x.99 boundaries by design. SpO2 and oxygen-delivery bands are identical across all age bands and are defined once under `shared`.

capillaryRefill.note: Below/equal 2s scores 0; >=3s scores 2. Charts do not define a score for 2.01-2.99s.

oxygen.note: High-flow devices (High Flow, BiPAP, CPAP) override with score 4. Level devices score per the oxygenDeliveryPercent / oxygenDeliveryLpm bands.

nonScoring.comment: Per the national SPOT NPEWS Configuration Document these parameters do NOT contribute numeric points. They are recorded and drive escalation only.

escalation.comment: PEWS total to escalation level. Reference only — the runtime escalation thresholds live in npews-scorer.js and the display metadata in npews-scoring-config.js (ESCALATION_META).
